entity.name: Pratik Singh
entity.description: Third-year B.Tech student at NIT Jalandhar building AI infrastructure and developer tooling. Created Repository Intelligence Platform (RIP) — a production system that transforms codebases into a Neo4j knowledge graph with hybrid BM25 + vector retrieval, a VS Code extension, and MCP integration for AI coding agents. Also building Context Gateway, an LLM context optimization layer for concurrent AI agent sessions.

projects.name: Repository Intelligence Platform (RIP)
projects.description: A production repository intelligence system that parses 9 languages into a Neo4j knowledge graph with typed relationships, hybrid BM25 + Qdrant + cross-encoder retrieval, a two-phase async indexing pipeline, VS Code extension with live terminal streaming, and MCP auto-configuration for Claude, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, and Aider. Enables AI coding agents to reason over software architecture instead of raw source code.

projects.name: Context Gateway
projects.description: An LLM context optimization layer that classifies intent, plans token-budgeted multi-source retrieval, runs parallel source execution with circuit breakers, and manages session memory and conflict detection for concurrent AI coding agent sessions.

plans.name: Infrastructure and Compute
plans.description: Covers monthly costs for Neo4j, Qdrant, and PostgreSQL hosting plus GPU compute for embedding model development and testing.

plans.name: Full-time Development
plans.description: Supports dedicated full-time work on RIP and Context Gateway — expanding language parsers, improving retrieval quality, shipping Context Gateway phases 5-15, and building the public documentation and open source community.

plans.name: One-time Support
plans.description: Any one-time contribution to support the project.
